amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 375 in DIY & Tools (See Top 100 in DIY & Tools) 11 in Power Strips

features: 【4 Gang Extension Cable】 4 Connection Sockets serve 13A/250V/3120W, enable you to power up 4 electrical appliances together like computer, smart phone, ipad, printer, monitor etc. With the extension cord you can easily convert the wall outlet into 4, ideal for using in bedroom, kitchen, living room, study, office etc.

【Individual Switch Control】 4 way power extension with independent switch and indicator light, makes the process visible and controllable and you don’t need to leave everything powered on all the time, which is more convenient, secure and energy-saving.

【Surge Protected Extension Lead】 Surge protector with light indicates that the surge suppressor is working, protects connected devices from getting harmed when surge, overload occurs. This power strip is protected against overvoltage, overcurrent, overload, short-circuiting, greatly incarese safety for your use.

【Childproof Design】Built-in children protection safety door, designed for the protection of young children from mis-insertion of fingers into the plug sockets, eliminating the hidden dangers. CE&UKCA Approved.

【Wall Mounted Socket Extensions】 With 2 keyhole mounting slots on the rear of the extension socket, you can hang it wherever you want, fixed on the wall or hidden under the desk, which provides a great solution for space-saving and making the desktop tidy and well-organized.
description: Product Description Brand: ExtraStar Ports: 4 Way Switches: 4 Voltage: 13A/250V~ Max. Load: 3120W Wall-mounted: Yes Surge Protection: Yes Copper Wire: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² ExtraStar 4 Way Multi Sockets Power strips Extension Lead with Extension Cable 4 Gang Surge Protected Extension Cords ExtraStar is constantly looking for safe and efficient products for improving user experience and creating a new generation of technology and products that truly meet the needs of hundreds of families. Keep packaging bag away from children. Do not use in wet conditions. Do not exceed total maximum load. Do not wire directly to the mains. Fully extend before use. Key Features Built-in surge protection can reduce heat production and power resistance. Anti-thunder protection ensure safety for household electric appliances, offering an extra safety and a peaceful mind while charging. Every socket with 75N safety shutter in it, which equivalent to the force of picking up a 7.5kg object, can prevent children from inserting their fingers and causing electric shock. With anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers. H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² 40 roots fused copper wire is thick and strong, will not get loosen and deformation easily. Good electrical conductivity will reduce heat and extend life span. Laboratory
